entries.title: Dementor attack and underage magic hearing

content.fact: After the Little Whinging Dementor attack, Harry faces underage-magic legal consequences before being cleared at a Ministry hearing.

content.fact: At St Mungo’s, Harry’s group sees Arthur recovering and learns more about Neville’s parents, making Neville’s family trauma more visible but still private.
content.injection: At St Mungo’s, Arthur is recovering and Neville’s parents become more visible to Harry’s circle; treat Neville’s family trauma as serious and private.
